task: Stabilize Day 0 to Day 1 practice transition timeout feedback

governance_bootstrap.summary: Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing changes require real verification evidence before completion reporting.
Completion reporting requires available user-entrypoint verification and scripts/agent_completion_guard.py evidence validation.

changes: Added an optional timeout override to the VP training session sync client.
Raised only the Day 0 safety confirmation to Day 1 transition sync timeout from the shared 16 second default to 45 seconds.
Added a full-screen loading overlay while Day 1 practice is being opened so the learner can see that work is in progress.
Added timeout recovery that re-fetches the session after a 408 and moves to Day 1 if the backend completed the safety confirmation despite the frontend timeout.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-BdFYpvEy.js

verification.name: Day 0 transition overlay and timeout bundle check
verification.command: rg -o 'Day 1 실습을 여는 중입니다|안전 확인을 저장하고|45_000|45e3|45000' harness-os/edu-app/src harness-os/edu-app/dist/assets/index-BdFYpvEy.js
verification.result: passed: source and production bundle contain the Day 1 loading overlay text and 45 second timeout path

residual_risk: This session did not have an authenticated learner session for a live Day 0 confirmation click before deploy; production bundle verification is run after deploy.
